name: Official Downloaders
description: Official Cove downloaders for yt-dlp media, Reddit posts, common audio sites, and common text sites.
author: Cove Team

externalDependencies.name: yt-dlp
externalDependencies.description: Required by the yt-dlp downloader and scene metadata scraper.
externalDependencies.installHint: The extension uses an explicit path, PATH, or a managed copy in its tools directory.
externalDependencies.nativeHint: Install yt-dlp on PATH or set a path in the extension settings. Impersonation support needs a yt-dlp build with curl_cffi support.
externalDependencies.dockerHint: Bake yt-dlp into the image for deterministic containers, or persist the extension directory so the managed copy survives restarts.

settings.name: YtDlpPath
settings.description: Optional executable path. Environment variables COVE_YTDLP_PATH and YT_DLP_PATH take precedence.

settings.name: Impersonate
settings.description: Passed to yt-dlp --impersonate for sites that require browser-like requests.

settings.name: Password
settings.description: Password passed to yt-dlp --password and stored in the Cove config file.
